column1: Hey Claire, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
yeaa thats where I'll be too
how many ppl in your group so far?
We have 6, how do I book the rooms?
Ill send you a reservation for the dates you want and your group size. were y'all ready to get started tonight?
awesome. Is 5 nights okay? march 9-14? thats what most groups do
perfect. whats the best email to send it all to?
just sent that over lmk if you got it. theres some info in the email with a step by step on how to navigate the reservation

I got it thank you sm! Is there anyway we could push the first $200 payment back a little bit? We're starting our planning tonight, but we need a few days to get everything together before we actually book and put money down
also lmk if theres any specific questions you have about the trip I'm happy to answer
Yeah the 9th is good. I'll def have more questions as we think of them🤣
lol word thats updated. yea text me anytime with questions
What's the price breakdown look like? It said starts at $649, so just curious
yea thats the 4 night, 4 person room price
you have six, the max ppl in a room is 4, so we have two rooms of three
would you want to do the 4 night instead? the 3 person room price is $670 per person
Ok yeah I think we'd rather do 4 nights
yea we can do 9-13! ill up date it rn
all set. you'll see the $670 price
Awesome thank you! We should be all set now and have everyone on board, but I'll lyk if we have anymore questions
okay dope. yea lmk if anyone needs help getting the accounts set up and deposits in. I know it can be confusing sometimes
hey Claire whats up, how things lookin so far?

Hey! We're in a bit of a predicament right now. One girl is sounding like she might back out, but the rest of us are ready to secure our spot and pay the deposit right now. Could the 5 of us pay the deposit rn and switch the room situation around later if she ends up backing out?
yea I would asap if you can. I can adjust later if that happens
Is this the correct way to pay the deposit?
Also this breakdown doesn't make sense?

Hi Spiffy! This is Claire Braswell. I just texted you individually about the deposit, but Anna wanted to be in on the conversation too so that we can both be getting the info! Sorry if that makes it confusing
Hey this sms app we use for work doesn't work with group text my b!
Not sure if this is just going to you or both of you
Ohhh ok my bad😅 just me
Tell Anna she can text me
Unless you add any of the add ons
Ok, I sent her your contact. Why does it say payment 2 is $629 rn?
Looks like all 670 on my end
Yea just went through everyone's account one by one. All looks good. Anyone still seeing that?
sup Claire were y'all able to get things secured okay?

Yeah we're all in the process of putting the deposit down now. Jordan is saying she is for sure coming now, but she's studying abroad currently, so she is on a big time difference. I'm not sure if she will be able to get hers in by the deadline, but the rest of us will
Okay cool. Yea just lmk about Jordan, I'll adjust her slot

Hey Spiffy! Jordan just told us she isn't going anymore. We're trying to find someone else to take her spot in room 2 rn. If we can't find anyone, we'll have you switch it to a 2 person room. Just curious, do we run the risk of room prices going up by taking time to find someone else?
And/or should we be concerned about 2 person room availability running low?
hey! youll be fine, we'll just need to know soon as we can

Hi Spiffy! So sorry for all the back and forth, but Jordan has decided to come with us now. She joined the room, so are we all good to pay our remaining balances of $470 today? She'll be paying all $670 in-full. Just want to confirm that everything is good before we go ahead
hey hey, yea y'all are good to get those in
Ok thanks! Jordan is having an issue with the balance on hers. I just sent her your number so she will probably be texting you about that soon
Aight cool. you know what issue shes having?
I'm so sorry to do this again, but Jordan said nvm flights are too expensive. How much extra is it for the one room of 2 people?
it'd be $726 a person, so $56 more per person
hey morning Anna lmk Andrea would be taking Jordan's spot. saw she got in just need he to get the payment in so we can get her processed
hey Claire any word on Andrea?
She's not able to go, so it's just the 5 of us
thats been adjusted, everyone just has a slight balance of $22.40
Hey Spiffy, I got this email this morning and was wondering if we're still good if we pay the balance today? We didn't realize it was due last night
hey all good yea! ill adjust it for tomorrow so any time between now and tomorrow at midnight
Awesome thank you so much!! Sorry about that
yo Claire! is everyone else on the same flight as you?
Hey! We're all on the same flight except for Anna
word can you let Anna know to add her info onto her account. ill add the others in
I let her know. Thank you for doing that!!
Hey! any update on Anna's flight?
I reminded her to add it, but I'm not sure if she did
nah she hasnt yet unfort. we def need the info asap
I think she has it added now
yo Claire! just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Thank you! I'll ask the group and get back to you about the add-ons
We all decided we don't want to add anything, but I'll lyk if anything changes!
Yo spiffy! We just got here a little bit ago and haven't figured everything out yet. These lines are hell. Do you have any slightly underground bar recs?
There's a little line just about everywhere since the resort is packed right now
But if you head to the upstairs area, to the right of the main pool, the bar line is usually shorter
Can we book a booze cruise for tomorrow?
yo! yea just slide down to the lobby to the hospitality desk and they'll take care of you
would do it sooner than later for sure
How do we use the credit on our accounts? We want to put it towards a booze cruise
Hey, the only person that had a credit was Anna when we switched rooms around. We reimbursed that back to her bank account yesterday. It was $22.40
